name: Sourdough Pancakes #5
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs.
2. Add milk and starter to the beaten eggs.
3. Sift together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, salt, and sugar in a separate bowl.
4. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients until combined.
5. Drop the batter onto a hot griddle using large spoonfuls.
NOTE:
If an ungreased griddle is used, add 1/4 Cup Melted Fat to the above recipe. Bacon fat enhances the flavor of the pancakes.
